description: A square arrest card. The background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands in handcuffs with a dark gradient on the left. A top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with a white subline '2/14/2025 | Boston, MA'. A red diagonal corner banner at top-right reads 'BOSTON'. A large bold white name at mid-left reads 'Allison Jane Marchese'. A bold white 'CRIMES:' label is followed by three bullets: 'Obscene communications w/student', 'Unlawful restraint', and 'Reckless endangerment'. At the bottom-left are a round DHS seal and a white 'ICE' wordmark; at the bottom-right is a red box reading '-THE- WORST FIRST'. The image used in place of a mugshot is a stock photograph of handcuffs.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/14/2025 | Boston, MA; Allison Jane Marchese; CRIMES: Obscene communications w/student; Unlawful restraint; Reckless endangerment; BOSTON; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
